2008.issue: [S2008] Version 0.1.6 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3032.issue: [W3032] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" run triggered by tag "v0.1.6" for current release 0.1.6 failed [run #1453](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.tinymqttbroker/actions/runs/23317407808).

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.tinymqttbroker/blob/master/io-package.json).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/serverPort" attribute "label" uses key "MQTT Port" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.tinymqttbroker/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.

0086.issue: [W0086] "@tsconfig/node16" should match the major node.js version from [package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.tinymqttbroker/blob/master/package.json) engines.node (>=22). Please update to @tsconfig/node22 at [package.json](https://github.com/HGlab01/ioBroker.tinymqttbroker/blob/master/package.json).

0090.issue: [W0090] "/tsconfig.json" should be adjusted to match "@tsconfig/node22" (for example: "extends": "@tsconfig/node22/tsconfig.json").
